entities.description: An alternative and effective technique to control insect pests

entities.name: PROTEINASE INHIBITORS
entities.description: Proteins (PIs) used for sustainable insect pest management

entities.description: Proteins used for sustainable insect pest management

entities.name: RNAI
entities.description: RNA interference used to manage insect pests sustainably

entities.name: FOOD INSECURITY
entities.description: Lack of consistent access to enough food for an active, healthy life

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESSES
